stemHtml:
An aeroplane has a Basic Empty Mass of 1000 kg, located at station 92.
The pilot’s mass is 80 kg, located at station 100.
The fuel mass is 120 kg, located at station 130.
The length of the MAC is 60 inches, 0% MAC is at station 80.

What is the centre of gravity location of the loaded aeroplane in % MAC?
